title: [CI:DOCS] Update podman-remote docs
body:
Add support for multi level subcommands.
e.g. podman system connection.

Update the flags and add note for containers.conf.

comments.body:
@edsantiago Thanks.

podman-help is missing but that was only a link to podman(1) anyway

You can add podman-help by fixing the 'grep' as per my suggested PR. Maybe we need it, maybe we don't, that is not my decision to make. I choose to believe that if a man page exists, it's for a reason.
LGTM, and tested for mac and windows, and builds correctly on mac. thanks so much for fixing this up :)
